description: The image is a Very High Resolution (VHR) satellite mosaic from 2021, depicting a peri-urban landscape in Bordeaux, France. The base imagery shows residential areas with numerous detached houses, roads, several larger buildings (possibly institutional or commercial), sports facilities (tennis courts, football pitch), and forested/wooded sections. A large cleared field with visible tracks occupies the bottom-left portion. Three distinct polygonal areas are outlined in red, representing a "change detection layer" where significant land cover or land use changes were identified between 2018 and 2021. These red-outlined areas appear to correspond to recent construction or land alteration. A north arrow is present in the top-left, and a scale bar in the bottom-left indicates a distance of 200 m.
